title: Machine Learning Engineer I
description:
Asana's work management platform helps millions track and collaborate on work. We're making it possible for teams to achieve more together.

We're seeking a Machine Learning Engineer I to join our Project Management team in Boston. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Design and implement machine learning models for production systems
Develop data pipelines for model training and feature engineering
Evaluate model performance and optimize for accuracy, latency, and resource efficiency
Collaborate with data scientists and engineers on end-to-end ML system design
Maintain documentation and implement MLOps best practices
Participate in code reviews and contribute to ML infrastructure improvements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years in machine learning, data science, or software engineering with ML focus
certifications: Machine learning certifications or Kaggle competitions appreciated
